test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-dateTime-with-timezone
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:dateTime, with a timezone
test-case.test: fn:build-dateTime(fn:dateTime-record(xs:integer(1999), xs:integer(5), xs:integer(31), xs:integer(13), xs:integer(20), xs:decimal(0), xs:dayTimeDuration("-PT5H")))

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-dateTimeStamp-coercion-from-map
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:dateTime, with a timezone

modified.change: changed xs:duration to xs:dayTimeDuration so only coercion is map and renamed to match; created new test for coercion from xs:duration

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-timezone-coercion-from-duration-valid
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the timezone is an xs:duration

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-timezone-coercion-from-duration-invalid
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the timezone is an xs:duration greater than 840 minutes

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-without-timezone
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:dateTime, without a timezone value.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-without-timezone-from-map
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:dateTime, without a timezone value.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-date-with-timezone
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:date, with a timezone

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-date-without-timezone
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:date, without a timezone

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-time-with-timezone
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:time, with a timezone

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-time-without-timezone
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:time, without a timezone

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-time-decisecond
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:time, where the second is precise to a decisecond.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-time-centisecond
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:time, where the second is precise to a centisecond.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-time-millisecond-1
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:time, where the second is precise to a millisecond.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-time-millisecond-2
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:time, where the second is precise to a millisecond.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-time-high-precision
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:time, where the seconds may need truncation.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-negative zero
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the seconds are negative zero as double.

modified.change: fix query syntax, value, expected result

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-gYear-with-timezone
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:gYear, with a timezone

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-gYear-with-timezone-from-map
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:gYear, with a timezone

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-gYear-without-timezone
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:gYear, without a timezone

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-gYear-without-timezone-from-map
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:gYear, without a timezone

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-gYearMonth-with-timezone
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:gYearMonth, with a timezone

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-gYearMonth-without-timezone
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:gYearMonth, without a timezone

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-gMonth-with-timezone
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:gMonth, with a timezone

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-gMonth-without-timezone
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:gMonth, without a timezone

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-gMonthDay-with-timezone
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:gMonthDay, with a timezone

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-gMonthDay-without-timezone
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:gMonthDay, without a timezone

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-gDay-with-timezone
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:gDay, with a timezone

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-gDay-without-timezone
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:gDay, without a timezone

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-gDay-coercion-from-xs:double
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:gDay, without a timezone

modified.change: fix expected result (no coercion from double to integer)

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-gDay-coercion-from-xs:decimal
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:gDay, without a timezone

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-dayTimeDuration
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:dayTimeDuration, which is not a valid input, even though it would be valid to create a dateTime-record that contains only timezone data.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-empty-record
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when all the fields in the fn:dateTime-record are set to the fn:empty-sequence

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-empty-sequence
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the sole argument supplied is the fn:empty-sequence

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-zero-args
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when no argument is supplied

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-multiple-args
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when more than one fn:dateTime-record is supplied

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-string
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the sole argument supplied is a string, which is not one of the expected datatypes.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-year-more-than-4-digits
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:date during a year with more than 4 digits.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-year-zero
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:date during the year zero.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-year-negative
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:date with a negative year value.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-too-few-months
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:date with fewer than 0 months.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-too-many-months
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:date with more than 12 months.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-too-few-days
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:date with fewer than 0 days.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-too-many-days-usually-31
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:date with more than 31 days.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-too-many-days-usually-30
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:date with more than 30 days in a month that usually only has 30.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-too-many-days-feb-non-leap-year
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:date with more than 28 days, in February when it's not a leap year.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-too-many-days-feb-leap-year
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:date with more than 29 days, in February during a leap year.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-too-few-hours
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:time with fewer than 0 hours.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-too-many-hours
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:time with more than 24 hours.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-too-few-minutes
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:time with fewer than 0 minutes.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-too-many-minutes
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:time with more than 59 minutes.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-too-few-seconds
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:time with fewer than 0 seconds.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-too-many-seconds
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input represents an xs:time with 60 or more seconds.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-missing-month
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input would represent an xs:dateTime but is missing a month.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-time-missing-hours
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input would represent an xs:time but is missing the hours component.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-time-invalid-hours
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when hours=24.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-time-fractional-hours
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when hours is fractional.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-time-infinite-hours
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when hours is infinity.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-time-NaN
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the minutes and seconds are NaN as doubles.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-time-missing-minutes
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input would represent an xs:time but is missing the minutes component.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-time-missing-seconds
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input would represent an xs:time but is missing the seconds component.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-time-unexpected-year
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input would represent an xs:time but also includes an incomplete date component.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-date-unexpected-minutes
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime when the fn:dateTime-record input would represent an xs:time but also includes an incomplete time component.

test-case.name: fn-build-dateTime-from-current-dateTime
test-case.description: Evaluates fn:build-dateTime applied to modified result of parts-of-dateTime

modified.change: fix query (must not set timezone to empty sequence)
